themes.label: Holiness

Commentary leans on "And when he that hath an issue is cleansed of his issue; then he shall number to himself seve...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְטָהֵֽר׃: and shall be clean - to be pure (physical sound, clear, unadulterated; levitically...".
